events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessed: alignment without post-repair ADAS recalibration is a non-compliant shortcut, not acceptable practice — any alignment change shifts the geometric reference that cameras/radar are aimed against, per OEM position statements. Marked `fail`, `risk: high`, with corrective actions (steering angle reset, static/dynamic calibration, road test, documentation) written to `/app/answer.json`.
